untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'acceleration rate in standard deviations' which is not available in allowed indicators. Acceleration requires second-order derivative calculation (rate of change of returns). Closest proxy used: returns > 0.5% as proxy for positive acceleration, but true acceleration_threshold_stddev cannot be precisely translated without a dedicated acceleration indicator.
translation_notes: Price acceleration proxied using returns metric. Volume condition translated to vol_ratio_20 > 1.1 (110% of 20-period avg). Price break of swing high/low proxied using Donchian channels (dc_upper/dc_lower). Acceleration threshold (0.5 stddev) approximated as returns magnitude threshold (0.5% = 0.005). Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per signal specification, with separate entry/exit rules for both LONG and SHORT scenarios.
